name: MSI MAG B760M MORTAR WIFI II Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7800+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x4 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax (B760MMORWIFI2)
shortName: MSI MAG B760M MORTAR WIFI II Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with PCIe 5.0 and WiFi 6E.
